reviews.review_description: This game offers an interesting concept where you as a dream agent travels get to explore peoples memories, while solving puzzles and fighting off enemies. It is an interesting concept that definitely offers room for more immersive story-telling and engaging puzzles. Looking forward to future updates!
Wow what a cool idea! Had a lot of fun with this, needs a little more polish but it's really fun and weird so far. Had my eyes on this a while, looking forward to where it goes in the future

developer_response.body: What a delight to get a review like yours Leadboots1! By citing "Sandman" I think you get much of our references there, 'nough said. :) Keep an eye out on our newest update coming up. And perhaps have a look at the prequel, Dream Tango Ascension in the meantime. :)

reviews.review_description: I am admittedly not a big gamer, but I have gone through the first dream four times and after finding several items with which to interact I can’t figure out what else to do and have to escape after others arrive.  There may be something simple I am missing, but I can’t find a walkthrough and there aren’t hints besides color outlines. There also doesn’t seem to be a subtitle option so maybe I am missing something the guide says that would help…

developer_response.body:
Hi Kbj5,
thank you for your thorough analysis and review. You are right about the lack of subtitles and not so obvious solution to the first dream. We are currently working on an update that covers those weaknesses and won't disappoint! Bare with us, and we shall bring hints and extra content to the beta, during Q1 2022. We could tell you the solution now, but this would spoil the fun, ;)

reviews.review_description: And now I need more...!!It took me a couple of tries to really grasp the right gameplay for sure, but after that, it was pretty straightforward what needed to be done in order to solve the dream. Time is of the essence people, but don’t get frustrated!! You need to be VERY observant, check everything no matter how bizarre it may seem to you…The voice of the guide might seem a bit distorted but I actually felt like I was indeed trying to hear someone’s voice while dreaming, nice touch!! Nice visuals for a Beta but I would like to see the finished product. Can’t wait to see the other dreams and how will they come to life!! And I would like to know more about the whole concept and some interesting things shown in the game…

developer_response.body:
Thank you ChristieGoldFish!

We are going to be more and more bizarre, until it all makes sense. Time is always a concern, since in the dream realm it works kind of weird, plus the fate of the Cosmos hangs in the balance! The sound and experience will get better, as we optimise and in our very next release, we will have tooltips and our first Side Quest. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_title: A brain teaser to keep an eye out for!
reviews.review_description: I'll be waiting for this one to come out! I loved the visuals and audio, they give a feeling of both mystery and serenity. It certainly could do with some more polishing, especially the audio, but it is still a beta after all. The setting is also interesting, has to do with lucid dreaming. There isn't much of a story yet, save for a static screen in the beginning that gives a very generic mythical background, but I'm sure this will be fleshed out in time. The puzzles are very simple but fun - I won't spoil it for others, but the end  was imaginative, to say the least! It also helps to be observant! It took me a few attempts to wrap my mind around the dream logic of it all and solve it, but it was a nice little brain teaser!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the overall positive response!

We are really glad you liked it and that you got intrigued by the premise! Indeed it is at the point a "brain teaser" and we are looking forward to your input while we develop and polish further! Audio is indeed an issue, and we are looking into upgrading it rather soon. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: The game has a really interesting setting. At the start of the game, I felt very relaxed and enjoyed the scenery, which is quite beautiful, but at the moment some scenes were not populated as much as the other. Later I found out that the puzzles are time bound, and that a certain event will occur, which will make you want to solve the puzzle like an escape room in real life. Because this is the first kind of game I have played in this kind of genre, it took me two tries to understand the clues given in the game. The demo only has one dream for you to play at the moment, but I can't wait for more content!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your overall positive response! Yes, it is quite tricky with the time and you have to be observant to find the answers to the puzzle. We can't wait to polish further and produce more content. It won't disappoint!
